title: Draft an edge-runtime prompt
summary: Experimental: compress a desktop prompt into a token-tight variant for an edge runtime.
body:
EXPERIMENTAL / DEV CARD.

Given a source prompt and a token budget, produce a compressed variant that preserves intent under the budget.

Return: { compressed_prompt, dropped, risk_notes }. Be explicit in risk_notes about meaning that may have been lost. This Card is unreviewed — do not rely on its output without checking.
